_comment: Ruleset for THIS framework repo's default branch (conventional governance per ADR 0001). Owner (Admin role) is on the bypass list so a solo maintainer can merge their own PRs (GitHub blocks self-approval). required_status_checks lists this repo's OWN ci jobs (not the consumer Gauntlet); they are applied only with `apply.sh --with-checks` once ci.yml emits them. The consumer-repo ruleset is a separate template at templates/project-scaffold/settings/branch-protection.json.
name: crucible-framework-main
